published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum–Krieger (1990) gives the ordered one-sided optimizer; Zhang–Small–Heng (2024), §5, supplies a close computational-hardness comparator, but neither states this opposite-tail union witness

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax — banked Gamma=1 equality regression fixture

published_prior_art.cite: Rosenbaum1987SensitivityPermutation — Gamma=1 yields the uniform matched-set assignment law; the reversal equality is an elementary specialization

repo_prior_art.cite: stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax — banked d-dagger gain 19/120 regression fixture

published_prior_art.cite: none — checked published comparators do not give this single-statistic opposite-tail witness

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 2 (thm:gamma-one-equality)
novelty_flags.one_line: The Gamma=1 equality is already banked in stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax; retain it only as a credited sanity/regression result.

novelty_flags.label: Proposition 1 (prop:gamma-two-gap-witness)
novelty_flags.one_line: The d-dagger gain 19/120 is already banked in stat_rosenbaum_lf_family_minimax and cannot contribute new kernel novelty.

novelty_flags.label: Theorem 1 (thm:opposite-tail-capability-separation-and-hardness)
novelty_flags.one_line: The Rosenbaum–Krieger capability refutation supplies neither a bibliography key nor a theorem/page quotation establishing the cited ordered-candidate restriction; add the precise published target and anchor.

novelty_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1 / related_work
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey misses Zhang–Small–Heng (2024), which explicitly locates the Rosenbaum–Krieger ordered optimizer and a related hardness boundary, and the 2025 preprint Exact, Nonparametric Sensitivity Analysis for Observational Studies of Contingency Tables, which is a close exact worst-case-calibration comparator with different design scope.

novelty_flags.label: Proposal-level comparator positioning
novelty_flags.one_line: The comparator-promise table is missing, while the prose names Rosenbaum–Krieger, Fogarty–Small, Rosenbaum (2018), Cohen–Olson–Fogarty, and Zhao-style doubled-tail workflows without a statement giving a strict theorem-level comparison to any named published result.

soundness_flags.label: ass:prespecified-score
soundness_flags.one_line: Given the Fisher sharp null, F-fixed potential outcomes, and scores defined solely as functions of the sharp-null record r, conditional fixedness is already implied; drop it or redefine r/scoring to state the additional non-adaptivity it supplies.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / Fisher-sharp-null model
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Calibration is conditional on the Fisher sharp null and the Rosenbaum conditional product-law class, not on weak-null or heterogeneous-effect validity.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Exact shared-law two-tail calibration UNDER the Fisher-sharp-null Rosenbaum product-law model.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: Open-ended Question 1 / computational domain
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Exact termination and verification are claimed only for finitely encoded rational scores, alpha, and Gamma; no polynomial-time claim is made.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Finite terminating exact-rational certification ON the stated rational encoded-input domain.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a comparator-promise table and a theorem-level statement against a named workflow: identify its exact output, theorem/equation anchor, and a heterogeneous family on which the shared-law calibration is strictly tighter or differs.
Cite Rosenbaum–Krieger by bibliography key and quote or pinpoint its ordered-score optimizer theorem; state that the new witness refutes only extension of that theorem to opposite-tail unions.
Add Zhang–Small–Heng (2024) and the 2025 exact contingency-table preprint, then delimit the matched-set product-law and single-statistic union features absent from each.

Make the operational gain substantive beyond implicit enumeration: give a parameterized complexity, polynomial-delay, score-range dynamic-programming, or certificate-compression guarantee that survives the stated #P-hardness result.

recommended_next_step: Revise the comparator map and theorem-level comparison, credit the banked Gamma fixtures as substrate, and sharpen the exact-certificate question into a nontrivial operational guarantee before re-running novelty review.
